typed_terminal_plan_signal.command: rtk jq -s '{planUpdateCount:([.[] | select(.direction=="incoming" and .frame.method=="session/update" and .frame.params.update.sessionUpdate=="plan")] | length),turnItemPlanTokenCount:([.[] | select((.frame|tostring)|contains("TurnItem::Plan"))] | length)}' RUN_DIRECT/raw-frames.jsonl

explicit_implement_plan_action.command: rtk jq -s '{availableCommandNames:([.[] | select(.direction=="incoming" and .frame.method=="session/update" and .frame.params.update.sessionUpdate=="available_commands_update") | .frame.params.update.availableCommands[]?.name] | unique | sort),containsImplement:([.[] | select(.direction=="incoming" and .frame.method=="session/update" and .frame.params.update.sessionUpdate=="available_commands_update") | .frame.params.update.availableCommands[]?.name] | any(test("implement";"i")))}' RUN_EDGECASES_FINAL/raw-frames.jsonl
